description: Design a mounting plate for a custom 2x3 mechanical keyboard macropad. Create a DXF file at /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/macropad_plate.dxf with three layers: SWITCH_CUTS (Red), PLATE_OUTLINE (White), and MOUNTING_HOLES (Cyan). The SWITCH_CUTS layer must contain 6 square cutouts (14.00 mm x 14.00 mm) in a 3x2 arrangement with a 19.05 mm pitch, with the top-left switch center at (40, 80). The PLATE_OUTLINE layer must define the outer boundary with a 6.00 mm margin from the switch cutouts and 3.00 mm radius fillets on all corners. The MOUNTING_HOLES layer must include 4 circular holes (3.20 mm diameter) centered 3.50 mm inward from the theoretical un-filleted corners.
